body_txt: Someone, under the cover of anonymity, acts like a Jerkass on the Internet. Common techniques are insults and personal attacks, derogatory videos , Catfishing , bigotry (like racism, sexism, or homophobia), doxxing, sexual or other harassment, and in the most extreme cases, death threats or plotting terrorist attacks . The perception of jerks on the Internet has changed over time. Since people online cannot physically confront each other, "Internet Tough Guy" used to be a synonym for people who talk a big game but cannot follow it up . However, during The New '10s , an increased recognition of the emotional harm that verbal harassment can cause, instances of cyberbullying leading to suicides, and cases of terrorists announcing their intentions online before actually carrying them out in Real Life , have all reduced the implication that an Internet jerk's words are mere show. Often goes hand-in-hand with a Social Media Is Bad message. If the jerk is really online, it may overlap with Tech Bro or Nerdy Bully . Can overlap with Bad Influencer as well, except those people are famous and do it. Can overlap with Troll , though not all trolls are on the Internet and not all Internet trolls are this bad. No Real Life Examples, Please!
